title: Senior Software Engineer - Naukri.com - Freshers Welcome

jsonLd.title: Senior Software Engineer - Naukri.com - Freshers Welcome
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Senior Software Engineer looking for your next big career move? Naukri.com in Rajkot offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Naukri.com:
Naukri.com is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Participate in on-call rotation for production support
• Mentor junior developers and conduct knowledge-sharing sessions
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA
• Implement new features based on product requirements
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in MongoDB
• Proficiency in Python
• Proficiency in Go
• Proficiency in Rust
• Proficiency in React
• Proficiency in Docker
• Proficiency in AWS

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Flexible working hours
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Rajkot, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Naukri.com!
